docs:
# Split Text
Split and stagger text by characters, words, or lines with 3D rotation.
## Import
```tsx
import { SplitText } from "@/components/ui/split-text";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<SplitText text="Hello" splitType="chars" delay={50} duration="0.8s" />
```
## Props
- **text** (string) — default: `"Hello"`: Text
- **splitType** (string) — default: `"chars"`: Split type
- **delay** (number) — default: `50`: Stagger (ms)
- **duration** (number) — default: `0.8`: Duration (s)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add split-text
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/split-text
```
